proposals.old_text: Tender Export OS profile has owner Telegram gateway delivery working via `hermes send --to telegram:<dm>`; do not store or print the chat ID. Google Drive Knowledge Bus root exists and `gws` can upload non-sensitive artifacts to it.
proposals.content: Tender Export OS profile has owner Telegram gateway and Telegram home cron delivery working; use redacted `hermes send --to telegram`/home targets and never store or print chat IDs. Google Drive Knowledge Bus root exists and `gws` can upload non-sensitive artifacts to it.
proposals.why: Weekly review found verified Telegram cron delivery setup receipt and existing Drive sync receipt; this consolidates the durable environment fact without adding a duplicate memory.
